commands.review_summary:
The PR mocks gateway client start-readiness in `operator-approvals-client.test.ts` before importing the operator approvals client under test.

PR surface: Tests +9. Total +9 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: no. independent high-confidence failing reproduction was run in this read-only review. Source inspection confirms the test currently imports the operator approvals client without mocking the readiness helper that the production path calls.

target.title: test(gateway): isolate operator approval readiness
target.body:
## Summary
- Isolate `operator-approvals-client.test.ts` from shared Vitest module cache state by mocking gateway client readiness before importing the module under test.
- Keeps the test on its existing mocked `GatewayClient` path instead of waiting on the real event-loop readiness helper.

## CI failures addressed
- Stabilizes the gateway-client shared-worker test pattern behind the current main CI investigation.
- refs 1ef85c7d4c0b

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway-client.config.ts src/gateway/operator-approvals-client.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Prevents the operator approval client unit test from depending on real gateway event-loop readiness in shared Vitest workers.
Real environment tested: Local macOS checkout with Node 24 via the repo Vitest wrapper.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway-client.config.ts src/gateway/operator-approvals-client.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
Evidence after fix: The focused file passed: 1 test file, 10 tests.
Observed result after fix: The mocked client starts immediately through the readiness mock and the callback/cleanup assertions complete.
What was not tested: Full CI on this PR has not completed yet; latest `main` CI at `6037a7466079be6a0583afe5127fd0a8c38fc7e0` was already green.
target.author: romneyda
